subject: New Request: Software Engineer – Fintech
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Payloop (fintech) is looking for a lead Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2023-02-25
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (remote)
• Rate: up to 1050 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Python
• Kubernetes
• Kafka

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
